    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    C

    cancelSelection() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Cancels current step and rolls selection flow back by one stage.
    canShoot() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Returns whether a shot can currently be fired.
    canShoot() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Checks whether Exorcist can shoot now.
    canShoot() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Checks whether a shot can be fired.
    CanUseSkill - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SkillState
    Skill is ready to use.
    character - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Character model represented by this pane.
    character - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Selected character model for this player.
    Character - Class in logic.entity
    Base abstract character model shared by all playable classes.
    Character() - Constructor for class logic.entity.Character
    Creates a character with fallback default stats.
    Character(int, int, int, int, float, int) - Constructor for class logic.entity.Character
    Creates a character with explicit base stats.
    characterList - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Available character instances indexed to UI card positions.
    CharacterPane - Class in component.scene1
    Visual card for one selectable character in scene 1.
    CharacterPane(int) - Constructor for class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Creates a character card for the character at the given index.
    CharacterSelectScene - Class in component.scene1
    Character selection scene shown before the match starts.
    CharacterSelectScene() - Constructor for class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Builds the full character selection UI, binds input handlers, and starts scene BGM.
    charBG - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Normal (unselected) pane background.
    charBGSelect - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Selected pane background.
    chargeForeground - Variable in class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Dynamic yellow layer that grows as cooldown progress increases.
    checkGameOver() - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Checks HP values and triggers game-over flow if either player reaches zero HP.
    checkGroundCollision() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Resolves simple ground collision and resets vertical motion when touching ground.
    checkHit() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Checks melee hitbox intersection against enemy hitbox and applies damage/lifesteal.
    clampToArenaBounds() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Clamps player horizontal position inside arena bounds.
    clearPlayer1() - Method in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Resets player 1 status text to default selecting message.
    clearPlayer2() - Method in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Resets player 2 status text to default selecting message.
    component.scene1 - package component.scene1
     
    component.scene2 - package component.scene2
     
    confirmSelection() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Processes current selection and advances the two-player selection flow.
    consumeAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Consumes one ammo and starts shoot cooldown.
    consumeAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Consumes one ammo and updates shot timestamp.
    consumeAmmo() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Consumes one ammo unit for a successful shot.
    cooldownBackground - Variable in class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Static red layer that indicates the full cooldown area.
    CooldownSkill - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SkillState
    Skill is recharging and cannot be used.
    countdownLabel - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Center timer label in MM:SS format.
    createNewCharacter(String) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Creates a new character instance from selected character name.
    createPreviewImageView() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Creates a standardized preview image node for player preview panels.
    currentAmmo - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Current available ammo.
    currentAmmo - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Current remaining bullets.
    currentDistance - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Distance already traveled since spawn.
